violations.text: The interior and exterior surfaces of the refrigeration units were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The basement and stairwell was observed with an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities must be cleaned to prevent harborage conditions for rodents. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The ceiling in the front prep area is in poor repair. Ceiling must be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The kitchen is lacking a hand-washing sink. Establishment will install a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area and front prep area are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceilings to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
